description: You are a Customer Service Representative. You received a phone call from a customer, Sarah Mitchell, who cannot place an order online. Manually create an order in the WooCommerce admin panel for Sarah Mitchell (456 Oak Avenue, Portland, OR 97201, US; Email: sarah.mitchell@email.com; Phone: 503-555-0147). The order must include one Wireless Bluetooth Headphones (SKU: WBH-001) and two USB-C Laptop Chargers 65W (SKU: USBC-065). Set the order status to 'Processing' and the payment method to 'Cash on delivery'.
